---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Deployio
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-review"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🎯 Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## 🔧 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🏗️ Implementation Details

- **Service**: [Frontend/Backend/AI Service/Agent]
- **Components**: [List main components affected]
- **API Changes**: [Any new endpoints or modifications needed]

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups

If applicable, add mockups or wireframes.

## 📊 Success Criteria

How will we know this feature is successful?

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## 🏷️ Component Labels

- [ ] Frontend (React/Vite)
- [ ] Backend (Express)
- [ ] AI Service (FastAPI)
- [ ] Agent (Deployment)
- [ ] Database (MongoDB/Redis)
- [ ] WebSocket
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation
